mapper.select: select count(*) from board where board_type = #{i} and board_status='Y'
select * from board join member on(board_writer = id) where board_type = #{i} and board_status = 'Y' order by board_id desc
mapper.insert:
select seq_bid.nextval from dual
insert into board values(#{boardId}, #{boardTitle}, #{boardWriter}, #{boardContent}, default, sysdate, sysdate, default, #{boardType})
mapper.select: select * from board join member on(board_writer = id) where board_status = 'Y' and board_id = #{id}

select * from attachment where attm_status = 'Y' and
attm_level = 0
ref_board_id = #{bId}
order by attm_id
mapper.insert:
insert all
into attachment
values(new_aid, #{item.refBoardId}, #{item.originalName}, #{item.renameName}, #{item.attmPath}, #{item.attmLevel}, default)
select * from dual
mapper.update: update attachment set attm_level = 0 where attm_id = (select min(attm_id) from attachment where ref_board_id = #{boardId})
mapper.select: select * from(select * from board join member on(id = board_writer) where board_status = 'Y' order by board_count desc) where rownum <= 5
select * from reply join member on(reply_writer = id) where ref_board_id = #{bId} and reply_status = 'Y' order by reply_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into reply values(seq_rid.nextval, #{replyContent}, #{refBoardId}, #{replyWriter}, sysdate, sysdate, default)
